hero.title: Labarai
hero.subtitle: Kasance cikin sanarwa game da sabbin nasarorinmu, ayyukan da ke tafe, karɓuwa na masana'antu, da kuma hangen nesa na dabarunmu don makomar masana'antu ta atomatik.

excellenceAward.title: Injiniya na Powerton Ya Samu Kyautar Kyauta ta 2024
excellenceAward.excerpt: An gane shi don ƙirƙira ta musamman a cikin masana'antu ta atomatik da mafita na injiniyan lantarki.

ntpcContract.title: Samun Babban Kwangila tare da NTPC don Kera Wutar Lantarki ta atomatik
ntpcContract.excerpt: An ba da kwangilar sarrafa kansa mai zurfi don aikin zamani na tsohuwar tashar wutar lantarki mai karfin 500MW.

renewableExpansion.title: Faɗaɗa Maganin Makamashi Mai Sabuntawa a Indiya
renewableExpansion.excerpt: Sabbin iyawar EPC na hasken rana da haɗin gwiwa suna tallafawa sauyin makamashi mai sabuntawa na Indiya.

rdFacility.title: Sabuwar Cibiyar Bincike da Ci Gaba ta Zamani An Ƙaddamar da Ita a Noida
rdFacility.excerpt: Sabuwar cibiyar R&D mai girman sq ft 5,000 a Noida yanzu tana aiki, sanye take da sabbin kayan aikin gwaji da manyan dakunan gwaje-gwaje na sarrafa kansa don haɓaka samfur.

europeanPartnership.title: An Ƙulla Haɗin gwiwa tare da Babban Mai Ba da Fasahar Kera Na Turai
europeanPartnership.excerpt: Mun kulla kawance na dabarun tare da babban mai ba da fasahar sarrafa kansa ta Turai don kawo sabbin PLC da mafita na SCADA zuwa kasuwar Indiya.

isoAchievement.title: Nasarar Takaddun Shaida ta ISO 9001:2015
isoAchievement.excerpt: Injiniya na Powerton ya sami nasarar cimma takardar shaidar ISO 9001:2015, yana nuna jajircewarmu ga tsarin kula da inganci da ci gaba mai dorewa a duk faɗin matakai.

seo.title: Injiniya na Powerton - Masana'antu ta atomatik & Kayan Kula | China
seo.description: Babban mai kera kayan kula na lantarki, tsarin sarrafa masana'antu, da mafita na kayan aiki. Sabis na injiniya na ƙwararru tare da ƙwarewar shekaru 15+, suna hidima a duniya.
seo.keywords: Kayan kula na lantarki, masana'antu ta atomatik, sarrafa tsari, kayan aiki, cibiyar kula da wutar lantarki, cibiyar kula da motoci, injiniyan lantarki, china, sarrafa kansa

hero.subtitle: Babban fayil ɗinmu na samfura da sabis yana ba da cikakkiyar mafita, yana haifar da nasarar masana'antu kuma yana tabbatar da cewa an rufe kowane fanni na buƙatun injiniyan ku.

about.label: Game da Mu
about.title: Barka da zuwa Powerton Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
about.description: Abokin ku amintacce wajen samar da ingantattun mafita da sabis na injiniya. An kafa shi da hangen nesa don ƙarfafa masana'antu ta hanyar ƙirƙira da kyau, mun ƙware a ba da cikakken kewayon samfuran lantarki da kayan aiki.
about.visualDescription: Injiniyoyin kasar Sin ƙwararru suna aiki akan sarrafa kansa na masana'antu da tsarin sarrafawa

mechanical.title: Injinan Inji
mechanical.description: Maganin famfo mai dorewa da kayan gyara

services.description: Daga sarrafa tsari zuwa kwangilolin kulawa, muna ba da cikakkun mafita na injiniya waɗanda aka keɓance don bukatun masana'antunku.

products.label: Kayayyakinmu
products.title: Maganin Kayan Kera Masana'antu ta atomatik
products.description: Cikakken kewayon samfuran lantarki da sarrafa kansa waɗanda aka ƙera don aminci, inganci, da ingantaccen aiki a cikin mahalli na masana'antu.

contact.label: Tuntuɓe Mu
contact.title: Bari Mu Tattauna Buƙatun Injiniyan Ku
contact.description: Shirye don fara aikin ku na gaba? Tuntuɓi ƙungiyar ƙwararrunmu don mafita na al'ada da shawarwari na ƙwararru.

hero.title: Tuntuɓi Ƙwararrun Injiniyoyinmu
hero.subtitle: Sami goyon bayan ƙwararru don masana'antu ta atomatik da ayyukan injiniyan lantarki. Ƙungiyarmu mai ƙwarewa a shirye take ta taimaka muku samun nasara.

clients.label: Abokan Cinikinmu

clients.description: Muna haɗin gwiwa tare da shugabannin masana'antu a fannoni daban-daban, suna ba da mafita na injiniya na musamman.
clients.testimonialsTitle: Abin da Abokan Cinikinmu Suke Faɗi

projects.label: Ayyukanmu
projects.title: Nasara da Aka Bayar da Maganin Injiniya
projects.description: Bincika fayil ɗin ayyukan da aka kammala, suna nuna ƙwarewarmu a cikin sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki.

seo.keywords: Game da Injiniya na Powerton, Kamfanin Kera Masana'antu ta atomatik, Kamfanin Injiniya na Lantarki, Sabis na Kayan Aiki, Masana Harkokin Kera na China

hero.title: Injiniya Mai Kyau Tun 2008
hero.subtitle: Abokin ku Amintacce a Masana'antu ta atomatik da Maganin Injiniya na Lantarki

story.title: Tafiyarmu da Hangen Nesa
story.description1: An kafa shi a cikin 2008 tare da hangen nesa don ƙarfafa masana'antu ta hanyar ƙirƙira da kyau, Injiniya na Powerton ya kasance kan gaba a cikin sarrafa masana'antu da mafita na injiniyan lantarki. Tafiyarmu ta fara ne da manufa mai sauƙi amma mai ƙarfi: don isar da sabbin mafita na injiniya waɗanda ke haifar da ci gaban masana'antu da ingancin aiki.
story.description2: A cikin shekarun da suka gabata, mun girma daga ƙaramin kamfanin injiniya zuwa abokin amintacce ga masana'antu a duk faɗin China da duniya. Ƙungiyarmu ta ƙwararrun injiniyoyi da ƙwararrun fasaha suna aiki ba dare ba rana don isar da mafita waɗanda ba wai kawai sun cika ba har ma sun zarce tsammanin abokan cinikinmu.

mission.title: Manufarmu
mission.description: Don samar da sabbin, abin dogaro, da dorewar mafita na injiniya waɗanda ke baiwa abokan cinikinmu damar cimma ƙwarewar aiki da haifar da ci gaban masana'antu.

vision.title: Hangarmu
vision.description: Don zama babban mai ba da sabis na sarrafa masana'antu da mafita na injiniyan lantarki, wanda aka gane don ƙwarewar fasaha, inganci, da kuma jajircewa ga nasarar abokin ciniki.

coreValues.title: Dabi'unmu Na Asali
coreValues.subtitle: Ka'idojin da ke jagorantar duk abin da muke yi

quality.title: Kyawawan Inganci
quality.description: Muna kiyaye mafi girman matsayi a kowane aikin da muke bayarwa

customer.title: Mayar da Hankali ga Abokin Ciniki
customer.description: Nasararku ita ce fifikonmu - muna gina haɗin gwiwa mai dorewa

innovation.title: Ƙirƙira

reliability.title: Amincewa
reliability.description: Maganin dogaro da zaku iya amincewa da mahimman ayyuka

certifications.title: Takaddun shaida da Ƙa'idodin Inganci
certifications.subtitle: An tabbatar da jajircewarmu ga inganci ta hanyar takaddun shaida da ƙa'idodin bin doka da masana'antu suka amince da su.

cta.description: Ƙungiyarmu ta ƙwararru a shirye take ta taimaka muku kawo masana'antu ta atomatik da ayyukan injiniyan lantarki zuwa rayuwa.

projects.portfolioDescription: Bincika iyawarmu na injiniya ta hanyar ayyukan nunin da ke nuna sabbin mafita a masana'antu. Fayil ɗin aiki na gaskiya yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba.

cta.title: Shirye don Fara Aikin ku na Gaba?
cta.description: Ƙwararrun injiniyoyinmu za su iya ƙirar mafita na al'ada don masana'antu ta atomatik da buƙatun injiniyan lantarki.

industrial-automation-demo.title: Demo: Tsarin Kera Masana'antu ta atomatik

industrial-automation-demo.description: Yana nuna cikakkun iyawar sarrafa masana'antu, gami da haɗin PLC, tsarin SCADA, da mafita na sa ido na ainihi.

power-distribution-demo.title: Misali: Kula da Rarraba Wuta
power-distribution-demo.description: Misalin tsarin rarraba wutar lantarki yana nuna daidaitaccen daidaitawar kaya da iyawar sa ido ta nesa don wuraren samar da wutar lantarki.

solar-plant-demo.title: Misali: Tsarin Kula da Kera Wutar Lantarki ta Rana
solar-plant-demo.client: Abokin Ciniki Mai Sabunta Makamashi na Gaba
solar-plant-demo.description: Yana nuna sa ido kan yanayi da iyawar daidaita grid na tsarin sarrafa hasken rana mai dacewa don ayyukan makamashi mai sabuntawa.

process-control-demo.title: Demo: Maganin Kula da Tsari
process-control-demo.client: Abokin Haɗin Gwiwar Masana'antu na Gaba
process-control-demo.description: Yana nuna cikakkun iyawar sarrafa tsari, gami da tsarin aminci, sa ido kan muhalli, da sarrafa tsari don aikace-aikacen masana'antu.
process-control-demo.duration: Watanni Takwas zuwa Goma Sha Biyu

smart-factory-demo.title: Demo: Haɗin Haɗin Masana'antu Mai Wayo

smart-factory-demo.description: Ci gaba da nunin haɗin masana'antu mai wayo yana nuna haɗin IoT, kulawa da hasashe, da iyawar Masana'antu 4.0.

hero.title: Ayyukanmu
hero.subtitle: Bincika ƙwarewarmu na injiniya ta hanyar ayyuka masu nasara 1200+ a masana'antu daban-daban, suna nuna ƙirƙira, inganci, da aminci.

seo.title: Kayayyakin Masana'antu da Kayan Aikin Sarrafa Kai - Injiniya na Powerton
seo.description: Cikakken kewayon kayayyakin sarrafa masana'antu, kayan lantarki, kayan aiki, tsarin hasken rana, famfo, da kayan aiki. Kayan aiki masu inganci don aikace-aikacen masana'antu.

cta.needExpertSolutions: Kuna Bukatar Maganin Masana'antu na Ƙwararru?
cta.expertDescription: Ƙwararrunmu na fasaha a shirye suke don taimaka muku wajen zaɓar cikakkun kayayyakin masana'antu da mafita na injiniya don sarrafa kanku da buƙatun lantarki.
cta.hmiDescription: Ƙwararrun HMI ɗinmu za su iya ƙira hanyoyin hulɗa masu fahimta ga tsarin sarrafa kanku.
cta.heatingDescription: Ƙwararrun dumamar mu za su iya ƙira tsarin dumama na al'ada don matakan masana'antu.
cta.diaphragmDescription: Injiniyoyin famfon mu za su iya taimaka muku zaɓar madaidaicin famfon diaphragm don buƙatun sarrafa sinadarai.
cta.calibrationDescription: Ƙwararrun daidaitawar mu suna tabbatar da cewa kayan aikin ku sun cika mafi girman ƙa'idojin daidaito.

seo.title: Sabis na Injiniya na Ƙwararru - Shigarwa, Kulawa & Sarrafa Kai | Injiniya na Powerton
seo.description: Sabis na injiniya na ƙwararru: Shirye-shiryen PLC, tsarin SCADA, sarrafa masana'antu, shigar da panel na lantarki, kulawa, daidaitawa, mafita na al'ada, da sabis na EPC na hasken rana a duk faɗin China.

custom.title: Kuna Bukatar Fayil na Al'ada?
custom.description: Kuna neman takamaiman bayanin aiki ko fayil ɗin da aka keɓance don masana'antar ku? Tuntuɓi ƙungiyarmu don takaddun da aka keɓance.

disclaimer.text: Ana ba da takaddun fayil ɗin don dalilai na bayani kawai. Don samun sabbin bayanai da takamaiman bayanan aiki, da fatan za a tuntuɓi ƙungiyarmu kai tsaye. Wasu bayanan aikin na iya zama na sirri kuma ana bayar da su a ƙarƙashin NDA kawai.

alert.contactMessage: Don samun damar takardun fayil ɗinmu, da fatan za a tuntuɓe mu kai tsaye a info@powertonengineering.com ko kira +86-138-0000-0000.

formSection.description: Don tambayoyi na gabaɗaya, bayanin sabis, ko tambayoyin fasaha

emergency.title: Tallafin Gaggawa
emergency.description: Gazawar tsarin mahimmanci? Ƙungiyarmu ta ba da agajin gaggawa tana samuwa 24/7 don taimakawa rage lokacin aiki.

seo.title: Tuntuɓi Injiniya na Powerton - Samu Tallafin Injiniya na Ƙwararru
seo.description: Tuntuɓi ƙwararrun injiniyoyinmu don sarrafa masana'antu, tsarin lantarki, da tallafin fasaha. Kira +91-94627-71662 ko imel info@powertonengineering.com
seo.keywords: tuntuɓi injiniya na powerton, tallafin injiniya, tuntuɓar sarrafa masana'antu, taimakon injiniyan lantarki, tuntuɓar kamfanin injiniya na noida

quickActions.title: Kuna Bukatar Taimako Wajen Neman Wani Abu?
quickActions.description: Ba za a iya samun abin da kuke nema ba? Tuntuɓe mu kai tsaye ko amfani da chatbot ɗinmu mai hankali wanda ke akwai a kowane shafi.

features.completedProjects: Ayyukan da aka kammala cikin nasara a masana'antu daban-daban
features.highQualityDesc: Fayil na ƙwararru tare da cikakkun hotunan aiki
features.verifiedResultsDesc: Ayyuka na gaske tare da sakamako mai aunawa da shaidun abokin ciniki

seo.title: Ayyuka a Injiniya na Powerton - Shiga Ƙungiyar Injiniyanmu
seo.description: Bincika damar aiki a Injiniya na Powerton. Shiga ƙungiyarmu ta ƙwararrun injiniyoyi kuma ku ba da gudummawa ga sabbin ayyukan sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki.
seo.keywords: ayyukan injiniya na powerton, ayyukan injiniya, ayyukan injiniyan lantarki, ayyukan injiniyan sarrafa kansa, ayyukan injiniyan masana'antu, ayyukan injiniya noida

careerGrowth.title: Girma Aiki
careerGrowth.description: Tsarin ci gaban aiki tare da sake dubawa na yau da kullun da damar haɓakawa.

learningDevelopment.title: Koyo & Ci Gaba
learningDevelopment.description: Shirye-shiryen horarwa na ci gaba, takaddun shaida, da damar haɓaka ƙwarewa.

workLifeBalance.title: Daidaitawar Rayuwa da Aiki
workLifeBalance.description: Lokutan aiki masu sassauƙa da cikakkun fa'idodin kiwon lafiya ga ma'aikata da iyalai.

teamCulture.title: Al'adar Ƙungiya
teamCulture.description: Yanayin aiki na haɗin kai tare da membobin ƙungiyar tallafi da buɗe sadarwa.

recognitionRewards.title: Ganewa & Kyauta
recognitionRewards.description: Ƙarfafawa bisa aiki, kari, da shirye-shiryen ganewa don aiki mai kyau.

innovationFocus.title: Mayar da Hankali ga Ƙirƙira
innovationFocus.description: Yi aiki akan fasahohi masu yankan-kaifi da sabbin hanyoyin sarrafa masana'antu.

whyJoinUs.title: Me yasa Zaɓi Injiniya na Powerton?
whyJoinUs.description: Kasance wani ɓangare na ƙungiya mai ƙwazo da ke tsara makomar sarrafa masana'antu da injiniyan lantarki

plcs.title: PLCs (Masu Kula da Dabaru Masu Shiryawa) - Sarrafa Masana'antu | Injiniya na Powerton
plcs.description: PLCs masu inganci daga manyan masana'antun: Siemens SIMATIC, Allen-Bradley CompactLogix, Schneider Modicon. Shirye-shiryen PLC na ƙwararru, shigarwa & tallafi a duk faɗin Indiya.
plcs.keywords: PLCs, masu kula da dabaru masu shiryawa, Siemens SIMATIC, Allen-Bradley CompactLogix, Schneider Modicon, masu kula da sarrafa masana'antu, shirye-shiryen PLC, sarrafa masana'anta

solarPanels.title: Panel ɗin Rana - Monocrystalline & Polycrystalline | Injiniya na Powerton
solarPanels.description: Panel ɗin hasken rana mai inganci: Monocrystalline (400W), Polycrystalline (320W), da Bifacial (450W). Cikakkun hanyoyin samar da makamashi mai hasken rana tare da tallafin shigarwa a duk faɗin Indiya.
solarPanels.keywords: panel ɗin hasken rana, panel ɗin hasken rana na monocrystalline, panel ɗin hasken rana na polycrystalline, panel ɗin hasken rana na bifacial, tsarin makamashi mai hasken rana, makamashi mai sabuntawa, shigar da hasken rana Indiya

scada.title: Tsarin SCADA - Sa ido & Kula da Masana'antu | Injiniya na Powerton
scada.description: Tsarin SCADA na ci gaba don sa ido na ainihi, samun bayanai, da sarrafa tsari. Cikakkun hanyoyin SCADA tare da haɗin HMI da iyawar samun dama ta nesa.
scada.keywords: tsarin SCADA, kula da kulawa, samun bayanai, sa ido kan masana'antu, sarrafa tsari, haɗin HMI, sa ido na nesa, software na SCADA
